nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Vendored Claude Code agent-skill index for building Remotion-based SaaS video apps: introduces the Player embed, rendering options, and framework/template choices, and points to the sibling framework.md, player.md, and rendering.md reference docs (plus external Remotion docs for Vue/Angular/Svelte). This is third-party reference documentation bundled for agent guidance, not versus-engine's own source.
nodes.languageNotes: Markdown skill manifest with YAML frontmatter (name/description/tags) used by the Claude Code skill-discovery system; body links out to co-located and external Remotion.dev docs rather than containing substantive content itself.

nodes.name: framework.md
nodes.summary: Vendored reference doc listing official Remotion starter templates (Next.js App Router with/without Tailwind, Next.js Pages Router, Vercel Sandbox, React Router 7, Express render server) and their default rendering choices, for use when choosing a framework for a Remotion SaaS app. External reference documentation, not part of versus-engine's own codebase.

nodes.name: player.md
nodes.summary: Vendored reference doc showing how to embed an interactive Remotion preview in a React app via `@remotion/player`, including a minimal `<Player>` usage example and notes on syncing dynamic metadata. External reference documentation bundled for agent guidance, distinct from versus-engine's own Remotion composition code.

nodes.name: rendering.md
nodes.summary: Vendored reference doc comparing programmatic Remotion rendering options (plain Node.js SSR, Remotion Lambda, Vercel, GitHub Actions, Azure Container Apps, Cloudflare Containers), with a detailed step-by-step Lambda setup checklist. External reference documentation for choosing a rendering backend, not versus-engine's own render pipeline.
